ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nuclei_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "filename" TEXT /* File name of the image */,
  "nucleus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the nucleus in the image */,
  "eccentricity" REAL /* Eccentricity value of the nucleus */,
  "num_G_probes" INTEGER /* Number of G probes used for the nucleus */,
  "num_R_probes" INTEGER /* Number of R probes used for the nucleus */,
  "num_Y_probes" INTEGER /* Number of Y probes used for the nucleus */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the image is part of */,
  "microscope_id" TEXT /* ID of the microscope used to capture the image */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was captured */,
  "capture_time" TEXT /* Time when the image was captured */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image file */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_depth" TEXT /* Bit depth of the image */,
  "image_channel" TEXT /* Channel of the image (e.g., G, R, Y) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nuclei_images_nucleus_id FOREIGN KEY ("nucleus_id") REFERENCES nuclei_metadata ("nucleus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nuclei_metadata" (
  "nucleus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the nucleus */,
  "x_center_of_mass" REAL /* X coordinate of the nucleus center of mass */,
  "y_center_of_mass" REAL /* Y coordinate of the nucleus center of mass */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the nucleus */,
  "perimeter" INTEGER /* Perimeter of the nucleus */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius of the nucleus */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the nucleus is part of */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the nucleus */,
  "circularity" REAL /* Circularity of the nucleus */,
  "solidity" REAL /* Solidity of the nucleus */,
  "convex_area" REAL /* Area of the convex hull of the nucleus */,
  "orientation" REAL /* Orientation angle of the nucleus */,
  "major_axis_length" REAL /* Length of the major axis of the nucleus */,
  "minor_axis_length" REAL /* Length of the minor axis of the nucleus */,
  "eccentricity_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the eccentricity to the area */,
  "intensity_mean" REAL /* Mean intensity of the nucleus */,
  "intensity_median" REAL /* Median intensity of the nucleus */,
  "intensity_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the intensity of the nucleus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nucleus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., scientist, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the researcher */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the uploaded image */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who uploaded the image */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the image is part of */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time when the image was uploaded */,
  "upload_location" TEXT /* Location from where the image was uploaded */,
  "upload_device" TEXT /* Device used for uploading the image */,
  "upload_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_uploads_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES nuclei_images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_uploads_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nucleus_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis event */,
  "nucleus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nucleus being analyzed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis method used */,
  "analysis_comments" TEXT /* Detailed comments or notes about the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nucleus_analysis_analysis_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nucleus_analysis_nucleus_id FOREIGN KEY ("nucleus_id") REFERENCES nuclei_metadata ("nucleus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nucleus_analysis_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission set */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permissions */,
  "can_upload" INTEGER /* Permission to upload images */,
  "can_analyze" INTEGER /* Permission to analyze images */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Permission to view analyses */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Permission to edit data */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Permission to delete data */,
  "can_generate_reports" INTEGER /* Permission to generate reports */,
  "can_upload_methods" INTEGER /* Permission to upload new analysis methods */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Permission to manage user roles and permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role mapping */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated permission set */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* Researcher who assigned the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_steps" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing step */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processed image */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the processing step */,
  "step_date" TEXT /* Date when the processing step was applied */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the processing step */,
  "processing_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the processing step */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the processing step (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_steps_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES nuclei_images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_steps_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyzed image */,
  "nucleus_count" INTEGER /* Count of nuclei in the image */,
  "mean_eccentricity" REAL /* Mean eccentricity of the nuclei in the image */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was completed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the results */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis method used */,
  "analysis_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the results */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the results (e.g., final, preliminary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_results_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES nuclei_images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_results_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_results_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis method */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* Version of the analysis method */,
  "method_author" TEXT /* Author of the analysis method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis method */,
  "method_publication" TEXT /* Publications related to the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_method_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method usage event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyzed image */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for analysis */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who used the method */,
  "usage_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the method usage */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Status of the method usage (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_method_usage_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES nuclei_images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_method_usage_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES analysis_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_method_usage_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_quality_assessment" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the image */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was performed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the assessment */,
  "assessment_comments" TEXT /* Detailed comments or notes about the quality assessment */,
  "assessment_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality assessment (e.g., final, preliminary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_quality_assessment_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_quality_assessment_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES nuclei_images ("image_id")
)
